reviews.comment:
Como en todos los lugares del Acá, atención excelente, el lugar impecable y además de los descuentos a socios el agua para el mate es gratis!

(Translated by Google)
As in all Acá locations, the service is excellent, the place is spotless, and in addition to member discounts, the water for mate is free!

reviews.comment:
El shop es chico y tiene pocas cosas cuando yo fui, si no pregunto parecía que era solo efectivo, pero tienen el postnet

(Translated by Google)
The shop is small and has few items. When I went, if I hadn't asked, it seemed like it was cash only, but they do have a card reader.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM1MjZDQU93EAE

excelente limpieza en los Baños  !!!

reviews.comment:
De los pocos lugares con agua pal mate gratis.  Los baños siempre impecables. Todo lo que esperas encontrar en la ruta.

(Translated by Google)
One of the few places with free hot water for mate. The bathrooms are always spotless. Everything you'd expect to find on the road.
